name: Dual Hero Hoodie
shortDescription: Premium heavyweight hoodie featuring the DUAL Chapter 1 hero artwork.
description: A cinematic black heavyweight hoodie built around DUAL: Chapter 1 — The Knock. Front chest O.W.P.I.L mark, full back anime art, sleeve detail, and purpose-driven design. Made to order, shipped worldwide.

name: Dual Oversized Tee
shortDescription: Oversized streetwear tee with DUAL Chapter 1 back art.
description: Relaxed oversized tee with O.W.P.I.L front mark and DUAL cityscape print across the back. Built for anime, manga, and streetwear audiences. Premium cotton, fade-resistant, double-needle stitched.

name: Seattle 2056 Poster
shortDescription: Premium wall poster from the DUAL universe.
description: Museum-style DUAL poster showing Seattle 2056 in a storm-lit cyberpunk future. High-resolution giclée print on premium semi-gloss paper. 18x24". Printed only when ordered.

name: Dual Eye Sticker Pack
shortDescription: Premium vinyl sticker set from the DUAL universe.
description: Ten weatherproof vinyl stickers featuring the DUAL eye, O.W.P.I.L marks, Seattle 2056, and Chapter 1 iconography. Perfect for laptops, water bottles, notebooks, and more. Fade-resistant, easy peel.

name: Chapter 1 Desk Mat
shortDescription: Large-format desk mat for gaming, work, and creation.
description: Extended desk mat featuring Seattle 2056 and DUAL Chapter 1 artwork. Designed for gaming setups, creative workstations, and collectors. 900x400mm, non-slip rubber base, stitched edges.

name: O.W.P.I.L Embroidered Hat
shortDescription: Embroidered O.W.P.I.L hat with red accent text.
description: Washed black dad hat with embroidered O.W.P.I.L wordmark and subtle purpose statement. 100% cotton, adjustable strap back, everyday piece for the core brand.

name: The Knock Phone Case
shortDescription: Protective phone case featuring DUAL eye artwork.
description: Durable phone case with The Knock visual language, scratch-resistant print, and precise fit. Dual-layer protection with shock-absorbing inner layer. Designed as a daily-carry story object.

name: Dual Collector Canvas
shortDescription: Limited collector canvas triptych from Seattle 2056.
description: Three-panel collector canvas from the DUAL universe. Gallery-wrapped canvas with solid wood frame, archival inks, and certificate of authenticity. Designed as a premium room piece with optional protected-edition verification.

name: Digital Wallpaper Pack
shortDescription: Ten high-resolution DUAL wallpapers for all devices.
description: Instant digital download. Includes DUAL cityscapes, character closeups, red moon visuals, and O.W.P.I.L branded wallpaper files. Multiple resolutions: mobile (16:9, 19.5:9), tablet (4:3), desktop (16:9, 21:9), and ultrawide (32:9). Personal use only.

name: Protected Artwork Certificate Pack
shortDescription: Certificate template pack for artists protecting branded artwork.
description: A starter kit for artists who want to protect, document, and present their artwork professionally. Includes certificate template, metadata checklist, product ID structure, and licensing explainer. Digital download with resizable templates.
